Tokenized Residential Rental Property Platform

United Properties TRU™ is launching a private offering portal for verified accredited investors to review limited partnership interests and security-token participation connected to a residential rental property roll-up strategy. Access is subject to identity verification, accredited-investor verification, offering documents, risk disclosures, subscription approval, and compliance review.

Offering Status

What we offer — and what we don't.

Offering Component Status
Limited Partnership Interests Available through the portal to verified accredited investors
Security Token Available through the portal, subject to verification and offering documents
Utility Token Not offered
Public Crypto Sale Not offered
Secondary Trading Not guaranteed
Property Owner Intake Open for review and underwriting
Investor Portal Launching on or about July 21, 2026
Current Offering

Limited Partnership Interests

United Properties TRU™ is offering limited partnership interests and security-token participation through a private offering portal.

Participation is limited to verified accredited investors who complete identity verification, accredited-investor verification, risk acknowledgment, subscription documentation, and compliance approval.

The offering is not a public token sale, not a public cryptocurrency offering, and not available to retail purchasers.

Private Portal Only

Access exclusively through the private offering portal after completing required onboarding.

Accredited Investors

Limited to verified accredited investors who complete identity and accreditation verification.

Subscription Documents

Participation requires execution of all required subscription and compliance documentation.

The opportunity

A $300 trillion market, now within reach.

Traditionally, owners of the roughly 50 million rental units in the U.S. lacked flexible liquidity options. To access cash, they were forced to either sell outright—incurring steep capital gains taxes and agent commissions—or take on debt by borrowing against the property. United Properties TRU™ unlocks a better path — for the ~20M mostly mom-and-pop owners, and for a new generation of accredited investors.

$485B+
Global residential rental income market
~50M
U.S. rental units (TAM)
ERC-3643
Tokenized ownership
USDC / fiat
Rental distributions
The Problem

For decades, the only way out was a slow, costly, broken process.

The Old Way

Every step below was required before an owner could access a single dollar.

Up to 48+ days just to close — with no guarantee

01.Application

14–24 days

02.Bank Approval

21–32 days

03.Legal Review

28–40 days

04.Escrow & Closing

35–48 days

Only then

You get your cash — maybe.

4–7 weeks. No guarantee.

And even after closing, owners still faced:

The same traps, every single day.

All-cash exits

Selling outright for cash triggers taxes and commissions — and ends all future income and appreciation participation.

Concentration risk

Relying on one property creates total income risk during vacancies. A multi-property fund secures cash flow.

Illiquid Capital

Most owners have over 50% equity locked up. Equity that can now be released for any purpose including earning additional returns.

Management burden

Tenants, repairs, vacancies, and paperwork — being a landlord never really stops.

The solution

From a single property to a diversified portfolio participation.

Property owners may contribute assets for review; investors participate through LP interests or security-token participation. Either way — a few steps, no paperwork mountains.

01
Create account

Start your onboarding through the private portal.

02
Identity verification

Complete identity verification and KYC.

03
Accredited investor verification

Confirm your accredited investor status.

04
Risk acknowledgment

Review and acknowledge all applicable risk disclosures.

05
Access offering documents

Review LP interest and security-token offering documents.

06
Review LP & token terms

Review LP interest and security-token participation terms.

07
Execute subscription

Sign and execute all required subscription agreements.

08
Compliance approval

Await final compliance review and approval.

09
Wire instructions

Receive wire/payment instructions after approval only.

10
Issuance records

LP interest and/or security-token issuance records issued.

Property Owners

Submit your property for review.

Property owners may submit residential rental properties or portfolios for review. Any acquisition, contribution, seller-financing, tokenized participation, or liquidity structure will be subject to underwriting, valuation, legal review, available capital, definitive agreements, and closing conditions.

United Properties TRU™ is evaluating transaction structures designed to provide property owners with potential liquidity alternatives while preserving certain negotiated economic participation rights where legally and commercially available.

Submit Property for Review
Submit for Review

Residential rental properties and portfolios accepted for underwriting review.

Legal Review

All structures subject to valuation, legal review, and definitive agreements.

Liquidity Alternatives

Potential liquidity structures evaluated where legally and commercially available.

Economic Participation

Negotiated participation rights preserved where legally and commercially available.

Limited Partnership Interests

Parent entity participation.

United Properties TRU™ is offering limited partnership interests in the parent entity holding the platform strategy, intellectual property, operating model, acquisition framework, and rights intended to support tokenized residential rental property acquisitions.

Participation is limited to verified accredited investors who complete the private portal onboarding process and execute required subscription documents.

View Current Offering
Platform Strategy

LP interests in the parent entity holding the platform strategy and operating model.

Intellectual Property

Rights to intellectual property and acquisition framework for tokenized property acquisitions.

Verified Investors Only

Limited to accredited investors who complete the full portal onboarding process.

Subscription Documents

Participation requires execution of all required subscription documents.

Target assets

Representative of the assets we tokenize.

Illustrative of our Phase 2 pipeline — residential long-term rentals and Airbnb-style short-term / vacation rentals. Specific properties and offering terms are disclosed to verified accredited investors.

Industry data indicates short-term / vacation rentals have historically averaged roughly 8–12% annual returns. Illustrative market data only — not a projection or guarantee of United Properties TRU™ returns.

Why United Properties TRU™

Eight reasons institutions and individuals choose us.

Professionally managed

Vetted operators with institutional track records.

Diversified pool ownership

ERC-3643 tokens representing a fractional interest in a diversified pool — not one building.

Transparent records

Verifiable ownership and on-chain audit trails.

Recurring rental income

Pro-rata distributions in USDC or fiat, monthly or quarterly.

Bankruptcy-remote

Each property is held in its own isolated United Properties TRU™ Limited Partnership.

Curated opportunities

Sourced and underwritten by our team before any raise.

Reg D 506(c) compliant

Offerings limited to verified accredited investors.

Institutional security

Compliance and controls built for the long term.

The technology behind it

Technology that makes real estate investing simpler.

We use modern infrastructure — smart contracts, secure transactions, transparent records — so that owning real estate feels as effortless as it should.

Step 1
Property

Sourced, underwritten, and placed in a United Properties TRU™ Limited Partnership

Step 2
ERC-3643 tokens

Issued to KYC-whitelisted investor wallets

Step 3
Verification

Ownership recorded on-chain with integrity

Step 4
Investor portfolio

Reflected in your dashboard

Step 5
Distributions

Paid pro-rata in USDC or fiat

ERC-3643·Reg D 506(c)·USDC distributions·On-chain whitelisting
Security & trust

Built with the controls institutions expect.

The United Properties TRU™ security token is intended to support compliant digital ownership records, investor onboarding, transfer restrictions, and platform-based administration of tokenized real estate participation.

Security tokens, if issued, will be securities and will be offered only pursuant to applicable exemptions, definitive offering documents, investor eligibility requirements, and compliance procedures.

The proposed security-token symbol is UPTRU, subject to final legal, technical, and listing review.

Identity & accreditation verification
Whitelisted transfers (ERC-3643)
Encrypted infrastructure
Reg D 506(c) compliance
Bankruptcy-remote series
Modern security standards
Distribution and reporting mechanics

From the property to your portfolio.

Stage 01
Property

Generates rental cash flow

Stage 02
Platform

Aggregates by token snapshot

Stage 03
Investor wallet

Receives USDC or fiat, pro-rata

Stage 04
Portfolio participation

Distributions if authorized under offering documents

Who it's for

Built for serious investors.

Frequently asked

Questions, answered.

Still curious? Our investor relations team is one message away.

Verified accredited U.S. investors, under Reg D 506(c). Every investor completes identity verification and accredited-investor verification before accessing the portal.
You hold ERC-3643 tokens (or, today, an LP interest) representing a fractional interest in a diversified pool of individual properties — each held in its own bankruptcy-remote United Properties TRU™ Limited Partnership — with on-chain transparency. And unlike a REIT, owners can contribute property for cash, tokens, or a mix of both — and stay invested.
If authorized under offering documents, distributions may be made pro-rata by token snapshot, in USDC or fiat. No specific amount, timing, or frequency is guaranteed.
Token transfers are restricted on-chain to verified, whitelisted investors (ERC-3643). No secondary market, exchange listing, or liquidity event is guaranteed.
Each property is bankruptcy-remote, transfers are whitelisted on-chain, identity and accredited-investor verification is completed before portal access, and every raise runs under Reg D 506(c).

Build your real estate portfolio with confidence.

Access regulated, tokenized real estate (ERC-3643) under Reg D 506(c), through a secure platform built for verified accredited investors.

United Properties TRU™

United Properties TRU™ is a private tokenized real estate offering platform for verified accredited investors, offering limited partnership interests and security-token participation connected to a residential rental property roll-up strategy.

This website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute an offer to sell or a solicitation of an offer to buy any security, digital asset, token, limited partnership interest, or investment contract except where made through definitive offering documents to eligible verified investors. United Properties TRU™ may offer limited partnership interests and security-token participation only through its private offering portal and only to persons who complete required identity verification, accredited-investor verification, risk acknowledgment, subscription documentation, and compliance procedures. Security tokens, if issued, will be restricted securities. No public market, exchange listing, secondary trading, liquidity event, redemption, distribution, appreciation, tax benefit, or investment return is guaranteed. Private securities, tokenized securities, real estate-related offerings, and early-stage business ventures involve substantial risk, including regulatory uncertainty, technology risk, cybersecurity risk, transfer restrictions, illiquidity, market volatility, operating risk, real estate risk, and possible loss of the entire investment.
